# SC-16: Infrastructure Security

**Track:** Security Controls (`SC`) · **Priority:** MUST (mandatory) · **Status:** draft

Validate the production environment security baseline immediately before deployment: verify patching status, access control configurations, network segmentation rules, infrastructure-as-code compliance, and absence of unexpected configuration drift since last validated baseline.

## Required In Stages

| Stage | Name | Applicability |
|-------|------|---------------|
| 5 | Deployment & Release | Mandatory |

## Delegation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Pattern** | Fully automated |
| **Agent does** | Scan production environment configuration against approved security baseline; report any deviations. |
| **Human does** | Review deviations; resolve before deployment or provide documented risk acceptance. |

## Outputs

| Artifact | Type | Description | Retention |
|----------|------|-------------|-----------|
| Infrastructure security baseline report | evidence | Validation results confirming production environment matches approved security baseline. | 7 years (DORA) |


## Automation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Frequency** | per_release |
| **SLA** | — |
| **Tooling** | — |

## Failure Behaviour

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **On failure** | block |
| **Escalate to** | Security Architect |

Deviations from security baseline block deployment until resolved or formally accepted.

## Dependencies

- `RC-06`


## Regulatory Mapping

| Regulation | Article | Obligation |
|------------|---------|------------|
| DORA | Art. 9(2) | Protection of ICT infrastructure through security baseline management |
| EU AI Act | Art. 15(4) | Appropriate level of cybersecurity in production environment for AI systems |


## Ownership

**Owner team:** Security / Infrastructure · **Owner role:** Security Architect
